mapper.select: SELECT C_QA_SEQ.nextval AS SEQ FROM DUAL
SELECT C_QA_ANSWER_SEQ.CURRVAL AS ANSWER_SEQ ,TO_CHAR(ANSWER_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS ANSWER_DT FROM C_QA_ANSWER

SELECT ANSWER_SEQ ,SEQ ,CONTENT ,TO_CHAR(ANSWER_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS ANSWER_DT ,LOGIN_ID AS SESS_LOGIN_ID ,ROLE_ID AS SESS_ROLE_ID ,ROLE_NM AS SESS_ROLE_NM ,USER_ID AS SESS_USER_ID ,USER_NM AS SESS_USER_NM FROM C_QA_ANSWER WHERE SEQ = #{SEQ} ORDER BY ANSWER_DT

SELECT ANSWER_SEQ ,SEQ ,LOGIN_ID AS SESS_LOGIN_ID ,ROLE_ID AS SESS_ROLE_ID ,ROLE_NM AS SESS_ROLE_NM ,USER_ID AS SESS_USER_ID ,USER_NM AS SESS_USER_NM FROM C_QA_ANSWER WHERE SEQ = #{SEQ} AND ANSWER_SEQ = #{ANSWER_SEQ}
SELECT SEQ ,TITLE ,REG_ID FROM C_QA WHERE SEQ = #{SEQ}

SELECT SEQ ,KIND ,GET_CCD_NAME(KIND, #{LANG_CD}) AS KIND_NAME ,TITLE ,CONTENT ,ANSWER ,REG_ID ,REG_NAME ,STATE ,GET_CCD_NAME(STATE, #{LANG_CD}) AS STATE_NAME ,REG_DT ,END_DT ,ANS_ID ,ANS_NAME FROM C_QA WHERE SEQ = #{SEQ}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT COUNT(*) OVER() AS TOTALCOUNT ,ROWNUM AS RN ,V.* FROM ( SELECT A.SEQ ,A.LOGIN_ID ,TO_DATE(A.CNNT_TRY_DTTI, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS TRX_DTTM ,A.USER_NM ,A.USER_IP AS USER_IP_ADDR ,SUBSTR(A.MNU_ID,1,12) AS MENU_ID ,CASE WHEN A.PGE_ID='main' THEN '메인화면' WHEN A.PGE_ID='logout' THEN '로그아웃' WHEN A.PGE_ID='roleChange' THEN '직무변경' WHEN A.PGE_ID='ruleTemplate' THEN '위험항목관리' WHEN A.PGE_ID='AML_00_02_01_01' THEN '데시보드' ELSE ( SELECT M.DISPLAY_NM FROM C_MENU_DISPLAY M WHERE M.LANG_CD = 'ko-KR' AND M.MENU_ACT_ID = SUBSTR(A.MNU_ID,1,9) ) END AS MENU_NM ,A.PGE_ID PAGE_ID ,CASE WHEN A.PGE_ID='main' THEN '메인화면' WHEN A.PGE_ID='logout' THEN '로그아웃' WHEN A.PGE_ID='roleChange' THEN '직무변경' WHEN A.PGE_ID='ruleTemplate' THEN '위험항목관리' ELSE ( SELECT N.DISPLAY_NM FROM C_WINDOW_DISPLAY N WHERE N.LANG_CD = 'ko-KR' AND N.WINDOW_ACT_ID = A.PGE_ID ) END AS DISPLAY_NM ,( SELECT X.DEP_TITLE FROM C_DEP_INFO X WHERE X.DEP_ID = A.BRCH_NO ) AS DEP_TITLE ,A.SQL_ID_VAL AS SQL_ID_VAL ,'View' AS CHK FROM TB_EBZI_AML_LOG_AC A WHERE 1 = 1
AND A.CNNT_TRY_DTTI >= #{CRE_DT_SD } || '000000'
AND A.CNNT_TRY_DTTI <= #{CRE_DT_ED } || '235999'
AND UPPER(A.USER_NM) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{USER_NM }) || '%'
AND A.LOGIN_ID LIKE #{LOGIN_ID } || '%'
AND A.BRCH_NO IN (SELECT C.DEP_ID FROM C_DEP_INFO C WHERE C.DEP_DESC =#{BRCH_NO})
AND A.PGE_ID LIKE #{PGE_ID } || '%'
AND A.USER_IP LIKE '%' || #{USER_IP } || '%'
ORDER BY
TRX_DTTM LOGIN_ID USER_NM USER_IP_ADDR MENU_NM DISPLAY_NM PAGE_ID DEP_TITLE SQL_ID_VAL TRX_DTTM
ASC DESC
ORDER BY TRX_DTTM DESC
) V ) WHERE 1=1
AND RN >= ( ( #{thisPage} - 1 ) * #{pageCount} + 1 ) AND RN <= ( #{thisPage} * #{pageCount} )

SELECT A.SEQ ,A.LOGIN_ID ,TO_DATE(A.CNNT_TRY_DTTI, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI:SS') AS TRX_DTTM ,A.USER_NM ,A.USER_IP USER_IP_ADDR ,SUBSTR(A.MNU_ID,1,12) MENU_ID ,CASE WHEN A.PGE_ID='main' THEN '메인화면' WHEN A.PGE_ID='logout' THEN '로그아웃' WHEN A.PGE_ID='roleChange' THEN '직무변경' WHEN A.PGE_ID='ruleTemplate' THEN '위험항목관리' WHEN A.PGE_ID='AML_00_02_01_01' THEN '데시보드' ELSE ( SELECT DISPLAY_NM FROM C_MENU_DISPLAY WHERE LANG_CD = 'ko-KR' AND MENU_ACT_ID = SUBSTR(A.MNU_ID,1,9) ) END AS MENU_NM ,A.PGE_ID PAGE_ID ,CASE WHEN A.PGE_ID='main' THEN '메인화면' WHEN A.PGE_ID='logout' THEN '로그아웃' WHEN A.PGE_ID='roleChange' THEN '직무변경' WHEN A.PGE_ID='ruleTemplate' THEN '위험항목관리' ELSE ( SELECT DISPLAY_NM FROM C_WINDOW_DISPLAY WHERE LANG_CD = 'ko-KR' AND WINDOW_ACT_ID = A.PGE_ID ) END AS DISPLAY_NM ,A.BRCH_NO ,( SELECT X.DEP_TITLE FROM C_DEP_INFO X WHERE X.DEP_ID = A.BRCH_NO ) AS DEP_TITLE ,A.PARAM_VAL SQL_PRMTR_VAL ,A.SQL_ID_VAL SQL_ID_VAL ,A.LOG_CNTN ,'View' AS CHK FROM TB_EBZI_AML_LOG_AC A WHERE A.SEQ = #{SEQ}
SELECT A.SEQ ,A.PARAM_VAL AS SQL_PRMTR_VAL FROM TB_EBZI_AML_LOG_AC A WHERE A.SEQ = #{SEQ}

SELECT '' AS SELECTED ,GYLJ_LINE_G_C ,GYLJ_LINE_NM ,USYN ,DR_DT ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(DR_TIME, 'HH24MISS'), 'HH24:MI:SS') AS DR_TIME ,( SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE LOGIN_ID = DR_OP_JKW_NO ) AS DR_OP_JKW_NM ,CHG_DT ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(CHG_TIME, 'HH24MISS'), 'HH24:MI:SS') AS CHG_TIME ,( SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE LOGIN_ID = CHG_OP_JKW_NO ) AS CHG_OP_JKW_NM ,'U' AS IDU FROM C_GYLJ_M WHERE 1=1 ORDER BY GYLJ_LINE_G_C

SELECT '' AS SELECTED ,GYLJ_LINE_G_C ,SNO ,SNO AS SNO_ORG ,GYLJ_ROLE_ID ,NEXT_GYLJ_ROLE_ID ,RTN_ROLE_ID ,DR_DT ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(DR_TIME, 'HH24MISS'), 'HH24:MI:SS') AS DR_TIME ,( SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE LOGIN_ID = DR_OP_JKW_NO ) AS DR_OP_JKW_NM ,CHG_DT ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(CHG_TIME, 'HH24MISS'), 'HH24:MI:SS') AS CHG_TIME ,( SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE LOGIN_ID = CHG_OP_JKW_NO ) AS CHG_OP_JKW_NM ,'U' AS IDU FROM C_GYLJ_D WHERE 1=1 AND GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY SNO
mapper.update: DELETE FROM C_GYLJ_M WHERE GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: SELECT B.GYLJ_LINE_G_C /* 결재선구분코드 */ ,A.GYLJ_LINE_NM /* 결재선명 */ ,B.SNO /* 순번 */ ,B.GYLJ_ROLE_ID /* 결재ROLE_ID */ ,C.ROLE_NM AS GYLJ_ROLE_NM ,B.NEXT_GYLJ_ROLE_ID /* 다음결재ROLE_ID */ ,D.ROLE_NM AS NEXT_GYLJ_ROLE_NM ,B.RTN_ROLE_ID /* 반려ROLE_ID */ ,E.ROLE_NM AS RTN_ROLE_NM FROM C_GYLJ_M A LEFT JOIN C_GYLJ_D B ON A.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = B.GYLJ_LINE_G_C LEFT JOIN C_ROLE C ON B.GYLJ_ROLE_ID = C.ROLE_ID LEFT JOIN C_ROLE D ON B.NEXT_GYLJ_ROLE_ID = D.ROLE_ID LEFT JOIN C_ROLE E ON B.RTN_ROLE_ID = E.ROLE_ID WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.GYLJ_LINE_G_C = #{GYLJ_LINE_G_C} AND B.GYLJ_ROLE_ID = #{GYLJ_ROLE_ID} AND A.USYN = 1
SELECT LPAD(C_GYLJ_H_SEQ.NEXTVAL, 9, '0') AS MAX_GYLJ_ID FROM DUAL

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT RANK() OVER(ORDER BY A.NOTI_ID DESC) AS IDX ,A.NOTI_ID ,A.TITLE ,A.CONTENT ,A.ISPOPUP ,A.ISSCROLL ,A.START_DT ,A.END_DT ,A.CRE_ID ,GET_USER_NAME(A.CRE_ID) AS CRE_ID_NM ,A.CRE_DT ,CASE WHEN ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM NIC90B_2 WHERE BOARD_ID= 'AML_01' AND BOARD_SEQ=A.NOTI_ID) > 0 THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS FILE_ATT_YN ,A.VIEW_COUNT ,A.QUICK_LINK ,A.UPD_DT ,A.UPD_ID ,GET_USER_NAME(A.UPD_ID) AS UPD_ID_NM FROM C_NOTI A WHERE 1=1 AND NVL(A.PKG_NAME, 'AML') = 'AML'
AND A.QUICK_LINK = 'Y'
AND UPPER(TITLE) LIKE '%'|| UPPER(#{searchWord}) || '%'
AND UPPER(CONTENT) LIKE '%'|| UPPER(#{searchWord}) ||'%'
) ORDER BY IDX ASC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT RANK() OVER(ORDER BY NOTI_ID DESC) AS IDX ,A.NOTI_ID ,A.TITLE ,A.CRE_DT FROM C_NOTI A WHERE 1 = 1 AND NVL(A.PKG_NAME, 'AML') = 'AML' AND QUICK_LINK = 'Y' ) WHERE 1 = 1 AND IDX <= 1 ORDER BY IDX ASC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT RANK() OVER(ORDER BY NOTI_ID DESC) AS IDX, ,A.NOTI_ID, ,A.TITLE, ,A.CONTENT, ,A.ISPOPUP, ,A.START_DT, ,A.END_DT, ,A.CRE_ID, ,GET_USER_NAME(A.CRE_ID) as CRE_ID_NM, ,A.CRE_DT, ,CASE WHEN ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM NIC90B_2 WHERE BOARD_ID= 'AML_02' AND BOARD_SEQ = A.NOTI_ID ) > 0 THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS FILE_ATT_YN FROM C_NOTI A WHERE 1=1 AND NVL(A.PKG_NAME, 'AML') = 'AML'
AND TITLE LIKE '%'|| #{searchWord} || '%'
AND CONTENT LIKE '%'|| #{searchWord} ||'%'
) ORDER BY IDX ASC

SELECT RANK() OVER(ORDER BY BOARD_SEQ DESC) AS IDX ,BOARD_ID ,( SELECT BOARD_NM FROM NIC90B WHERE BOARD_ID = A.BOARD_ID ) AS BOARD_NM ,BOARD_SEQ ,TITLE ,BOARD_CONTENT ,VIEW_COUNT ,REG_ID ,GET_USER_NAME(REG_ID) AS REG_NM ,REG_IP ,TO_CHAR(REG_DT, 'YYYYMMDD') AS REG_DT ,UPD_ID ,GET_USER_NAME(UPD_ID) AS UPD_NM ,TO_CHAR(UPD_DT, 'YYYYMMDD') AS UPD_DT ,TEMP_01 ,TEMP_02 ,TEMP_03 ,TEMP_04 ,TEMP_05 ,( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM NIC90B_2 WHERE BOARD_ID = A.BOARD_ID AND BOARD_SEQ = A.BOARD_SEQ ) AS FILE_COUNT FROM NIC90B_1 A WHERE BOARD_ID = #{BOARD_ID} AND BOARD_SEQ = #{BOARD_SEQ}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT RANK() OVER(ORDER BY BOARD_SEQ DESC) AS IDX ,BOARD_SEQ ,TITLE ,TO_CHAR(REG_DT,'YYYYMMDD') AS REG_DT FROM NIC90B_1 WHERE 1 = 1 AND BOARD_ID = 'AML_01') WHERE 1 = 1 AND IDX <= 1 ORDER BY IDX ASC

SELECT BOARD_ID ,BOARD_SEQ ,FILE_SEQ ,FILE_POS ,USER_FILE_NM ,PHSC_FILE_NM ,FILE_SIZE ,DOWNLOAD_COUNT ,REG_ID ,GET_USER_NAME(REG_ID) AS REG_NM ,REG_DT FROM NIC90B_2 WHERE BOARD_ID = #{BOARD_ID} AND BOARD_SEQ = #{BOARD_SEQ} ORDER BY BOARD_SEQ, FILE_SEQ

SELECT BOARD_ID ,BOARD_SEQ ,FILE_SEQ ,FILE_POS ,USER_FILE_NM ,PHSC_FILE_NM ,FILE_SIZE ,DOWNLOAD_COUNT ,REG_ID ,GET_USER_NAME(REG_ID) AS REG_NM ,REG_DT FROM NIC90B_2 WHERE BOARD_ID = #{BOARD_ID} AND BOARD_SEQ = #{BOARD_SEQ} AND FILE_SEQ = #{FILE_SEQ}
SELECT USER_ID ,GROUP_ID ,ROLE_ID ,CRE_ID ,CRE_DT FROM C_USER_GROUP_ROLE WHERE 1 = 1 AND USER_ID = #{USER_ID}
SELECT USER_ID FROM C_USER WHERE 1 = 1 AND LOGIN_ID = #{LOGIN_ID}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO C_USER_HST ( USER_ID ,DEP_ID ,USER_NM ,LOGIN_ID ,USER_PWD ,USER_IP ,SOC_NO ,ACTIVE_YN ,LAST_USE_DATE ,LAST_USE_IP ,PWD_FAIL_COUNT ,CRE_ID ,CRE_DT ,UPD_ID ,UPD_DT ,DEL_YN ,DEL_ID ,DEL_DT ,OFF_DUTY_YN ,VALID_START_DT ,VALID_END_DT ) SELECT USER_ID ,DEP_ID ,USER_NM ,LOGIN_ID ,USER_PWD ,USER_IP ,SOC_NO ,ACTIVE_YN ,LAST_USE_DATE ,LAST_USE_IP ,PWD_FAIL_COUNT ,CRE_ID ,CRE_DT ,UPD_ID ,UPD_DT ,DEL_YN ,DEL_ID ,DEL_DT ,OFF_DUTY_YN ,VALID_START_DT ,VALID_END_DT FROM C_USER WHERE 1 = 1 AND USER_ID = #{USER_ID}
mapper.select: SELECT A.NOTI_ID ,A.TITLE ,A.CONTENT ,A.USER_FILE_NM ,A.ISPOPUP ,A.START_DT ,A.END_DT ,GET_USER_NAME(CRE_ID) CRE_ID_NM ,A.CRE_DT ,A.UPD_ID ,A.UPD_DT FROM C_NOTI A WHERE TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN A.START_DT AND A.END_DT AND A.ISPOPUP = 'Y' ORDER BY CRE_DT DESC

SELECT RANK() OVER(ORDER BY A.NOTI_ID DESC) AS IDX ,A.NOTI_ID ,A.TITLE ,A.CONTENT ,A.ISPOPUP ,A.ISSCROLL ,A.START_TM ,A.END_TM ,A.START_DT ,A.END_DT ,A.CRE_ID ,GET_USER_NAME(A.CRE_ID) AS CRE_ID_NM ,A.CRE_DT ,( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM NIC90B_2 WHERE BOARD_SEQ=A.NOTI_ID AND BOARD_ID = 'AML_02' ) AS FILE_COUNT ,A.QUICK_LINK FROM C_NOTI A WHERE 1=1 AND NOTI_ID = #{NOTI_ID, jdbcType=INTEGER}
SELECT C_NOTI_SEQ.NEXTVAL AS C_NOTI_SEQ FROM DUAL

SELECT BOARD_ID ,BOARD_SEQ ,FILE_SEQ ,FILE_POS ,USER_FILE_NM ,PHSC_FILE_NM ,FILE_SIZE ,DOWNLOAD_COUNT ,REG_ID ,GET_USER_NAME(REG_ID) AS REG_NM ,REG_DT FROM NIC90B_2 WHERE BOARD_ID = #{BOARD_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND BOARD_SEQ = #{BOARD_SEQ, jdbcType=INTEGER} ORDER BY BOARD_SEQ, FILE_SEQ
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM C_NOTI WHERE NOTI_ID = #{BOARD_SEQ, jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select: SELECT NIC90B_1_SEQ.NEXTVAL AS NIC90B_1_SEQ FROM DUAL
SELECT DESC1 ,DESC2 FROM NIC93B WHERE JOB_ID = #{JOB_ID}

SELECT JOB_DT ,JOB_ID ,PARENT_JOBID AS PARENT_JOB_ID ,JOB_NM AS JOB_NM ,TO_CHAR(STRT_DY_TM,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS STRT_DY_TM ,TO_CHAR(END_DY_TM,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS END_DY_TM ,JOB_ST_CD ,TO_CHAR(HNDL_DY_TM,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS HNDL_DY_TM ,GET_USER_NAME(HNDL_P_ENO) AS HNDL_P_ENO_NM ,LAST_YN ,DISPLAY_ORDER ,DESC1 ,PROGRAM_NM ,PROC_FLAG ,TRADE_DT ,REPORT_DT FROM NIC93B_LOG WHERE JOB_ID != 'AML' AND JOB_ID = #{JOB_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND (LAST_YN = 'N' OR USE_YN = 'Y' ) AND JOB_DT LIKE #{JOB_DT, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%' ORDER BY STRT_DY_TM DESC, DISPLAY_ORDER

SELECT A.PAR_MENU_ACT_ID ,A.MENU_ACT_ID ,E.DISPLAY_NM ,DECODE(F.MENU_ACT_ID, NULL, 'N', 'Y') AS AUTH_YN FROM C_PKG_MENU_MAP A LEFT JOIN C_MENU_ACT B ON A.MENU_ACT_ID = B.MENU_ACT_ID LEFT JOIN C_MENU_DISPLAY E ON B.MENU_ACT_ID = E.MENU_ACT_ID LEFT JOIN (SELECT MENU_ACT_ID FROM C_GROUP_ROLE_MENU_ACT_AUTH WHERE GROUP_ID = #{GROUP_ID} AND ROLE_ID = #{ROLE_ID} ) F ON A.MENU_ACT_ID = F.MENU_ACT_ID WHERE A.PKG_ID = #{PKG_ID} AND B.MENU_DISPLAY_YN = 'Y' AND E.LANG_CD = #{LANG_CD} ORDER BY A.PAR_MENU_ACT_ID ASC, A.DISPLAY_ORDER ASC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT A.SEQ AS SEQ ,A.START_DT AS START_DT -- 시작일자 ,A.END_DT AS END_DT -- 종료일자 ,(SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE USER_ID = A.CRE_ID) AS RQST_P_NM -- 신청자 ,(SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE USER_ID = A.CHRG_P_ID) AS CHRG_P_NM -- 담당자 ,A.CHRG_P_ID ,GET_CODE_NAME('A032', A.TASK_DVCD ) AS TASK_DVCD_NM -- 구분명 ,A.TASK_DVCD AS TASK_DVCD -- 구분 코드 ,(SELECT DEP_TITLE FROM C_DEP_INFO WHERE DEP_ID = A.TGT_DEP_ID) AS TGT_DEP_NM -- 대상부점 ,(SELECT ROLE_NM FROM C_ROLE WHERE ROLE_ID = A.ROLE_ID) AS P_ROLE_NM -- 권한 ,A.ROLE_ID AS P_ROLE_ID ,A.RQST_CNTNT AS RQST_CNTNT -- 요청사유 ,GET_CODE_NAME('A033', A.APPR_STAT_CD ) AS APPR_STAT_NM -- 상태 ,A.APPR_STAT_CD ,A.RTN_CNTNT AS RTN_CNTNT -- 반려사유 ,TO_DATE(A.CRE_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CRE_DTTM -- 등록일시 ,A.DEL_YN AS DEL_YN -- 삭제여부 ,A.APP_NO ,A.CHRG_DEP_ID FROM C_MULTI_POSITION A WHERE A.RQST_P_ID = #{RQST_P_ID} AND A.START_DT >= #{CRE_DT_SD } AND A.START_DT <= #{CRE_DT_ED } ) A WHERE 1=1
AND A.CHRG_P_NM LIKE '%'||#{CHRG_P_NM}|| '%'
AND A.TASK_DVCD = #{TASK_DVCD}
AND A.TGT_DEP_NM LIKE '%'||#{TGT_DEP_NM}||'%'
AND A.P_ROLE_NM LIKE '%'||#{P_ROLE_NM}||'%'
ORDER BY A.APP_NO DESC

SELECT A.USER_NM AS CHRG_P_NM ,A.USER_ID AS CHRG_P_ID ,B.DEP_TITLE AS DEP_TITLE ,A.LOGIN_ID AS LOGIN_ID FROM C_USER A, C_DEP_INFO B WHERE 1=1 AND A.DEP_ID = B.DEP_ID AND A.DEL_YN = 'N' AND A.USER_NM LIKE '%' || #{CHRG_P_NM} || '%'
SELECT A.DEP_TITLE AS TGT_DEP_NM ,A.DEP_ID AS TGT_DEP_ID FROM C_DEP_INFO A WHERE A.DEP_TITLE LIKE '%'||#{TGT_DEP_NM}||'%'
SELECT ROLE_NM AS P_ROLE_NM ,ROLE_ID AS P_ROLE_ID FROM C_ROLE WHERE 1=1 AND ROLE_NM LIKE '%'||#{P_ROLE_NM}||'%'

WITH BASE_R AS ( SELECT MAX(A.WK_DT) AS MAX_DT FROM NIC00B_MART_LOG A WHERE A.WK_DT BETWEEN #{CRE_DT_SD} AND #{CRE_DT_ED} || '999999' GROUP BY SUBSTR(A.WK_DT,1,8) ) SELECT A.WK_DT AS WK_DT ,GET_CODE_NAME('A034', A.VRFY_ITEM_CD ) AS VRFY_ITEM_CD ,A.TABLE_NM ,A.TABLE_COMMENT ,A.COLUMN_NM ,A.COLUMN_COMMENT ,A.COLUMN_TYPE ,CASE WHEN SUBSTR(A.REFF_TBL,1,1) = '''' THEN ' '||A.REFF_TBL ELSE A.REFF_TBL END AS REFF_TBL ,CASE WHEN SUBSTR(A.EFFVAL_RANG, 0,1) = '''' AND SUBSTR(A.EFFVAL_RANG, LENGTH(A.EFFVAL_RANG),1) = '''' THEN ''''''||A.EFFVAL_RANG||'''''' ELSE A.EFFVAL_RANG END AS EFFVAL_RANG ,CASE WHEN A.COL_VAL = '정상' THEN '' ELSE D.CD_LIST END AS CD_LIST ,CASE WHEN A.TABLE_NM LIKE 't%' THEN '임시적재' ELSE '마트' END AS TABLE_TYPE ,CASE WHEN A.COL_VAL = '정상' THEN '정상' ELSE '오류' END AS COL_VAL ,CASE WHEN A.COL_VAL = '정상' THEN '' ELSE A.COL_VAL END AS COL_VAL_COMMENT ,A.COL_CNT ,CASE WHEN SUBSTR(A.ADD_SQL_WHERE, 0,1) = '''' AND SUBSTR(A.ADD_SQL_WHERE, LENGTH(A.ADD_SQL_WHERE),1) = '''' THEN ''''''||A.ADD_SQL_WHERE||'''''' ELSE A.ADD_SQL_WHERE END AS ADD_SQL_WHERE ,CASE WHEN SUBSTR(A.REMK, 0,1) = '''' AND SUBSTR(A.REMK, LENGTH(A.REMK),1) = '''' THEN ''''''||A.REMK||'''''' ELSE A.REMK END REMK FROM NIC00B_MART_LOG A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT CD ,LISTAGG(CNTNT||':'||CD_NM,CHR(10)) WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY CNTNT ) AS CD_LIST FROM ( SELECT B.* ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY B.CD ORDER BY B.CNTNT ) AS RNO FROM NIC92B B ) WHERE 1 = 1 AND RNO < 21 GROUP BY CD ) D ON D.CD = A.EFFVAL_RANG ,BASE_R E WHERE 1 = 1
AND VRFY_ITEM_CD = #{VRFY_ITEM_CD}
AND COL_VAL = '정상'
AND COL_VAL != '정상'
AND ADD_SQL_WHERE IS NOT NULL
AND ADD_SQL_WHERE IS NULL
AND (UPPER(A.TABLE_NM) LIKE '%'|| UPPER(#{TABLE_NM}) || '%' OR UPPER(A.TABLE_COMMENT) LIKE '%'|| UPPER(#{TABLE_NM}) || '%')
AND (UPPER(A.COLUMN_NM) LIKE '%'|| UPPER(#{COLUMN_NM}) || '%' OR UPPER(A.COLUMN_COMMENT) LIKE '%'|| UPPER(#{COLUMN_NM}) || '%')
AND A.WK_DT BETWEEN #{CRE_DT_SD} AND #{CRE_DT_ED} || '999999' AND A.WK_DT = E.MAX_DT ORDER BY WK_DT DESC, TABLE_TYPE, TABLE_NM, COLUMN_NM

SELECT A.WK_DT AS WK_DT ,GET_CODE_NAME('A034', A.VRFY_ITEM_CD ) AS VRFY_ITEM_CD ,A.TABLE_NM ,A.TABLE_COMMENT ,A.COLUMN_NM ,A.COLUMN_COMMENT ,A.COLUMN_TYPE ,CASE WHEN SUBSTR(A.REFF_TBL,1,1) = '''' THEN ' '||A.REFF_TBL ELSE A.REFF_TBL END AS REFF_TBL ,CASE WHEN SUBSTR(A.EFFVAL_RANG, 0,1) = '''' AND SUBSTR(A.EFFVAL_RANG, LENGTH(A.EFFVAL_RANG),1) = '''' THEN ''''''||A.EFFVAL_RANG||'''''' ELSE A.EFFVAL_RANG END EFFVAL_RANG ,CASE WHEN A.COL_VAL = '정상' THEN '' ELSE D.CD_LIST END AS CD_LIST ,CASE WHEN A.TABLE_NM LIKE 't%' THEN '임시적재' ELSE '마트' END AS TABLE_TYPE ,CASE WHEN A.COL_VAL = '정상' THEN '정상' ELSE '오류' END AS COL_VAL ,CASE WHEN A.COL_VAL = '정상' THEN '' ELSE A.COL_VAL END AS COL_VAL_COMMENT ,A.COL_CNT ,CASE WHEN SUBSTR(A.ADD_SQL_WHERE, 0,1) = '''' AND SUBSTR(A.ADD_SQL_WHERE, LENGTH(A.ADD_SQL_WHERE),1) = '''' THEN ''''''||A.ADD_SQL_WHERE||'''''' ELSE A.ADD_SQL_WHERE END ADD_SQL_WHERE ,CASE WHEN SUBSTR(A.REMK, 0,1) = '''' AND SUBSTR(A.REMK, LENGTH(A.REMK),1) = '''' THEN ''''''||A.REMK||'''''' ELSE A.REMK END REMK FROM NIC00B_MART_LOG A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT CD ,LISTAGG(CNTNT||':'||CD_NM,CHR(10)) WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY CNTNT ) AS CD_LIST FROM ( SELECT A.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY CD ORDER BY CNTNT ) AS RNO FROM NIC92B A ) WHERE 1 = 1 AND RNO < 21 GROUP BY CD ) D ON D.CD = A.EFFVAL_RANG WHERE 1 = 1
AND VRFY_ITEM_CD = #{VRFY_ITEM_CD}
AND COL_VAL = '정상'
AND COL_VAL != '정상'
AND (UPPER(A.TABLE_NM) LIKE '%'|| UPPER(#{TABLE_NM}) || '%' OR UPPER(A.TABLE_COMMENT) LIKE '%'|| UPPER(#{TABLE_NM}) || '%')
AND (UPPER(A.COLUMN_NM) LIKE '%'|| UPPER(#{COLUMN_NM}) || '%' OR UPPER(A.COLUMN_COMMENT) LIKE '%'|| UPPER(#{COLUMN_NM}) || '%')
AND ADD_SQL_WHERE IS NOT NULL
AND ADD_SQL_WHERE IS NULL
AND A.WK_DT BETWEEN #{CRE_DT_SD} AND #{CRE_DT_ED} || '999999' ORDER BY WK_DT DESC, TABLE_TYPE, TABLE_NM, COLUMN_NM

SELECT WK_DT ,COUNT(NRML_CNT) AS TOT_CNT ,SUM(NRML_CNT) AS NORM_CNT ,COUNT(NRML_CNT)-SUM(NRML_CNT) AS ERR_CNT FROM ( SELECT A.WK_DT ,GET_CODE_NAME('A034', A.VRFY_ITEM_CD ) AS VRFY_ITEM_CD ,CASE WHEN A.OK_YN = 'N' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS NRML_CNT ,A.OK_YN FROM NIC00B_MART_LOG A WHERE 1 = 1 AND WK_DT BETWEEN #{CRE_DT_SD} AND #{CRE_DT_ED} || '999999' ) GROUP BY WK_DT ORDER BY WK_DT DESC
mapper.update: DELETE FROM NIC00B_MART_LOG
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ID ,TABLE_NM ,B.COMMENTS AS TABLE_COMMENT ,COLUMN_NM ,C.COMMENTS AS COLUMN_COMMENT ,CASE WHEN D.DATA_TYPE IN ('VARCHAR2') THEN D.DATA_TYPE || '(' || D.DATA_LENGTH || ')' WHEN D.DATA_TYPE IN ('NUMBER') AND DATA_PRECISION IS NULL THEN D.DATA_TYPE || '(' || D.DATA_LENGTH || ')' WHEN D.DATA_TYPE IN ('NUMBER') AND DATA_PRECISION IS NOT NULL THEN D.DATA_TYPE || '(' || D.DATA_PRECISION ||','||D.DATA_SCALE || ')' ELSE D.DATA_TYPE END AS COLUMN_TYPE ,VRFY_ITEM_CD ,REFF_TBL ,CASE WHEN SUBSTR(EFFVAL_RANG, 0,1) = '''' AND SUBSTR(EFFVAL_RANG, LENGTH(EFFVAL_RANG),1) = '''' THEN ''''''||EFFVAL_RANG||'''''' ELSE EFFVAL_RANG END EFFVAL_RANG ,USE_YN ,CASE WHEN SUBSTR(ADD_SQL_WHERE, 0,1) = '''' AND SUBSTR(ADD_SQL_WHERE, LENGTH(ADD_SQL_WHERE),1) = '''' THEN ''''''||ADD_SQL_WHERE||'''''' ELSE ADD_SQL_WHERE END ADD_SQL_WHERE ,CRT_DT ,UPD_DT ,CASE WHEN SUBSTR(REMK, 0,1) = '''' AND SUBSTR(REMK, LENGTH(REMK),1) = '''' THEN ''''''||REMK||'''''' ELSE REMK END REMK FROM NIC00B_MART A LEFT OUTER JOIN USER_TAB_COMMENTS B ON A.TABLE_NM = B.TABLE_NAME LEFT OUTER JOIN USER_COL_COMMENTS C ON A.TABLE_NM = C.TABLE_NAME AND A.COLUMN_NM = C.COLUMN_NAME LEFT OUTER JOIN USER_TAB_COLUMNS D ON A.TABLE_NM = D.TABLE_NAME AND A.COLUMN_NM = D.COLUMN_NAME WHERE 1=1
AND USE_YN = 'Y'
AND USE_YN = 'N'
AND ADD_SQL_WHERE IS NOT NULL
AND ADD_SQL_WHERE IS NULL
AND VRFY_ITEM_CD = #{VRFY_ITEM_CD}
) WHERE 1=1
AND (UPPER(TABLE_NM) LIKE '%'|| UPPER(#{TABLE_NM}) || '%' OR UPPER(TABLE_COMMENT) LIKE '%'|| UPPER(#{TABLE_NM}) ||'%')
AND (UPPER(COLUMN_NM) LIKE '%'|| UPPER(#{COLUMN_NM}) || '%' OR UPPER(COLUMN_COMMENT) LIKE '%'|| UPPER(#{COLUMN_NM}) || '%')
ORDER BY TABLE_NM ASC
mapper.update: DELETE FROM NIC00B_MART WHERE ID = #{ID}
mapper.select: SELECT B.TABLE_NAME ,B.COMMENTS AS TABLE_COMMENT FROM ALL_TAB_COMMENTS B WHERE 1=1 AND OWNER ='SSQ' AND TABLE_NAME NOT LIKE '%$%' AND TABLE_TYPE = 'TABLE'AND TABLE_NAME LIKE '%NIC%' AND UPPER(B.TABLE_NAME) LIKE '%'|| UPPER(#{TABLE_NM}) || '%' ORDER BY B.TABLE_NAME

SELECT A.COLUMN_NAME ,CASE WHEN A.DATA_TYPE IN ('VARCHAR2') THEN A.DATA_TYPE || '(' || A.DATA_LENGTH || ')' WHEN A.DATA_TYPE IN ('NUMBER') AND DATA_PRECISION IS NULL THEN A.DATA_TYPE || '(' || A.DATA_LENGTH || ')' WHEN A.DATA_TYPE IN ('NUMBER') AND DATA_PRECISION IS NOT NULL THEN A.DATA_TYPE || '(' || A.DATA_PRECISION ||','||A.DATA_SCALE || ')' ELSE A.DATA_TYPE END AS COLUMN_TYPE ,B.COMMENTS as COLUMN_COMMENT FROM ALL_TAB_COLUMNS A , ALL_COL_COMMENTS B WHERE A.TABLE_NAME = B.TABLE_NAME AND A.COLUMN_NAME = B.COLUMN_NAME AND A.OWNER = B.OWNER AND A.OWNER = 'SSQ' AND A.TABLE_NAME = #{TABLE_NAME} ORDER BY COLUMN_ID

SELECT A.JOB_DT ,A.JOB_ID ,A.PARENT_JOBID as PARENT_JOB_ID ,A.JOB_NM as JOB_NM ,TO_CHAR(A.STRT_DY_TM,'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI:SS') AS STRT_DY_TM ,TO_CHAR(A.END_DY_TM,'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI:SS') AS END_DY_TM ,A.JOB_ST_CD ,TO_CHAR(A.HNDL_DY_TM,'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI:SS') AS HNDL_DY_TM ,GET_USER_NAME(A.HNDL_P_ENO) AS HNDL_P_ENO_NM ,A.LAST_YN ,A.DISPLAY_ORDER ,A.DESC1 ,A.PROGRAM_NM ,A.PROC_FLAG ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.TRADE_DT, 'yyyyMMdd'), 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS TRADE_DT ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.REPORT_DT, 'yyyyMMdd'), 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS REPORT_DT FROM NIC93B_LOG A WHERE 1=1 AND JOB_ID IN ('A30S10','A50S10') -- 사이트에 맞게 JOB_ID변경 AND JOB_ST_CD = '9' AND TRADE_DT IS NOT NULL AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT X.JOB_DT FROM NIC93B_LOG X WHERE 1=1 AND JOB_ID IN ('A30S10','A50S10') -- 사이트에 맞게 JOB_ID변경 AND X.JOB_ST_CD = 1 AND A.TRADE_DT = X.TRADE_DT AND X.JOB_DT = ( SELECT MAX(JOB_DT) FROM NIC93B_LOG WHERE SUBSTR(X.JOB_DT, 1, 8) = SUBSTR(JOB_DT, 1, 8) AND X.JOB_SEQ = JOB_SEQ GROUP BY SUBSTR(JOB_DT, 1, 8) ) ) ORDER BY STRT_DY_TM DESC, DISPLAY_ORDER DESC

SELECT A.LOGIN_ID ,A.USER_NM ,A.CELL_PHONE ,A.EMAIL ,A.UPD_DT ,A.VALID_START_DT ,A.VALID_END_DT ,A.DEL_YN ,A.ACTIVE_YN ,(SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER B WHERE B.USER_ID = A.UPD_ID ) AS UPD_NM ,A.UPD_DT ,(SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER B WHERE B.USER_ID = A.DEL_ID ) AS DEL_NM ,A.DEL_DT ,NVL(A.UPD_DT, A.DEL_DT) AS DT FROM C_USER_HST A WHERE USER_ID = #{USER_ID} ORDER BY DT DESC

SELECT B.USER_NM ,C.ROLE_NM ,CASE WHEN A.PROC_GUBUN = 'C' THEN '권한부여' WHEN A.PROC_GUBUN = 'D' THEN '권한삭제' END AS PROC_GUBUN ,A.PROC_DTM FROM C_USER_GROUP_ROLE_HIST A LEFT OUTER JOIN C_USER B ON A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN C_ROLE C ON A.ROLE_ID = C.ROLE_ID WHERE B.USER_ID = #{USER_ID} ORDER BY A.PROC_DTM DESC
SELECT LOGIN_ID ,OTP_PWD ,OTP_URL ,USER_ID ,OTP_DT FROM C_USER WHERE 1=1 AND LOGIN_ID = #{checklogin}
mapper.update: UPDATE C_USER SET OTP_PWD = NULL ,OTP_URL = NULL ,OTP_DT = NULL WHERE LOGIN_ID = #{LOGIN_ID_VAL}
mapper.select:
SELECT TO_DATE(A.CNNT_TRY_DTTI,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS CNNT_TRY_DTTI ,A.LOGIN_ID ,A.USER_NM ,A.USER_IP ,A.LOGIN_SUS_YN ,A.LOGIN_OUT FROM ( SELECT '로그인' AS LOGIN_OUT ,CNNT_TRY_DTTI ,LOGIN_ID ,USER_NM ,USER_IP ,LOGIN_SUS_YN FROM TB_EBZI_AML_LOG_SC UNION SELECT '로그아웃' AS LOGIN_OUT ,CNNT_TRY_DTTI ,LOGIN_ID ,USER_NM ,USER_IP ,'Y' AS LOGIN_SUS_YN FROM TB_EBZI_AML_LOG_AC WHERE PGE_ID ='logout' ) A LEFT OUTER JOIN C_USER B ON A.LOGIN_ID = B.LOGIN_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN C_DEP_INFO C ON B.DEP_ID = C.DEP_ID WHERE 1=1 AND A.CNNT_TRY_DTTI >= (#{CRE_DT_SD }||'000000') AND A.CNNT_TRY_DTTI <= (#{CRE_DT_ED }||'235999')
AND UPPER(A.USER_NM) LIKE '%' ||UPPER(#{USER_NM}) || '%'
AND A.LOGIN_SUS_YN = 'Y'
AND A.LOGIN_SUS_YN = 'N'
ORDER BY A.CNNT_TRY_DTTI DESC

SELECT WINDOW_ACT_ID ,FILE_POS ,PHSC_FILE_NM ,REG_DTTM ,FILE_TYPE ,LANG_CD FROM C_MANUAL_HIST WHERE FILE_TYPE = 'PDF' AND WINDOW_ACT_ID = #{WINDOW_ACT_ID} AND LANG_CD = #{SEL_LANG_CD} ORDER BY REG_DTTM DESC
SELECT WINDOW_ACT_ID ,MANUAL_YN FROM C_MENU_WINDOW_MAP WHERE WINDOW_DEFAULT_YN = 'Y' AND WINDOW_ACT_ID = #{WINDOW_ACT_ID}

SELECT WINDOW_ACT_ID ,COMMENT_SEQ ,CONTENT ,LOGIN_ID AS SESS_LOGIN_ID ,TO_CHAR(REG_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD hh24:mi:ss') AS REG_DT ,REG_ID AS SESS_REG_ID ,REG_NM AS SESS_REG_NM FROM C_MANUAL_COMMENT WHERE WINDOW_ACT_ID = #{WINDOW_ACT_ID} AND LANG_CD = #{SEL_LANG_CD} ORDER BY REG_DT

SELECT A.* ,B.FILE_POS ,B.USER_FILE_NM ,B.PHSC_FILE_NM --,FN_DATE_FORMAT(B.REG_DTTM) AS REG_DTTM ,(SELECT FN_DATE_FORMAT(MAX(REG_DTTM)) FROM C_MANUAL_HIST WHERE LANG_CD =#{SEL_LANG_CD} AND WINDOW_ACT_ID = DECODE(A.WINDOW_ACT_ID, '', A.MENU_ACT_ID, A.WINDOW_ACT_ID) AND FILE_TYPE = 'PDF') AS REG_DTTM ,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM C_MANUAL_HIST WHERE LANG_CD =#{SEL_LANG_CD} AND WINDOW_ACT_ID = DECODE(A.WINDOW_ACT_ID, '', A.MENU_ACT_ID, A.WINDOW_ACT_ID) AND FILE_TYPE = 'WORD') AS WORD_CNT ,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM C_MANUAL_HIST WHERE LANG_CD =#{SEL_LANG_CD} AND WINDOW_ACT_ID = DECODE(A.WINDOW_ACT_ID, '', A.MENU_ACT_ID, A.WINDOW_ACT_ID) AND FILE_TYPE = 'PDF') AS PDF_CNT ,B.REG_ID FROM (SELECT X.PAR_ID ,X.PAR_DISPLAY_NM ,X.MENU_ACT_ID ,DECODE(Y.WINDOW_ACT_ID,'','▶ ' || X.WINDOW_DISPLAY_NM, ' ▷ ' || X.WINDOW_DISPLAY_NM) AS WINDOW_DISPLAY_NM ,Y.WINDOW_ACT_ID ,Y.MANUAL_YN ,X.DISPLAY_ORDER FROM ( SELECT DECODE(T.MENU_ACT_ID, 'AML', '0', T.PAR_MENU_ACT_ID) AS PAR_ID ,DECODE(U.DISPLAY_NM, 'AMLExpress', '', U.DISPLAY_NM) AS PAR_DISPLAY_NM ,T.MENU_ACT_ID ,DECODE(U.DISPLAY_NM, 'AMLExpress', 'AMLXpress', U.DISPLAY_NM) AS WINDOW_DISPLAY_NM ,DECODE(T.MENU_ACT_ID, 'AML', 0, T.DISPLAY_ORDER) AS DISPLAY_ORDER FROM C_PKG_MENU_MAP T ,C_MENU_DISPLAY U ,(SELECT PAR_MENU_ACT_ID, MENU_ACT_ID FROM C_GROUP_ROLE_MENU_ACT_AUTH WHERE ACCESS_YN ='Y' GROUP BY PAR_MENU_ACT_ID ,MENU_ACT_ID) V WHERE T.PKG_ID = #{PKG_ID} AND T.MENU_ACT_ID = U.MENU_ACT_ID AND T.MENU_ACT_ID = V.MENU_ACT_ID AND U.LANG_CD = #{SEL_LANG_CD} --일시적용 -- AND T.MENU_ACT_ID NOT LIKE '%RBA%' -- AND T.MENU_ACT_ID NOT IN ('AML_70', 'AML_80') AND T.PAR_MENU_ACT_ID != 'AML_80' AND T.MENU_ACT_ID != 'AML_80' -- ) X ,( SELECT T.MENU_ACT_ID ,T.WINDOW_ACT_ID ,U.DISPLAY_NM ,T.MANUAL_YN FROM C_MENU_WINDOW_MAP T ,C_WINDOW_DISPLAY U WHERE T.WINDOW_ACT_ID = U.WINDOW_ACT_ID AND T.WINDOW_DEFAULT_YN = 'Y' AND U.LANG_CD = #{SEL_LANG_CD} ) Y WHERE X.MENU_ACT_ID = Y.MENU_ACT_ID(+) ) A ,C_MANUAL B WHERE B.LANG_CD(+) = #{SEL_LANG_CD} AND DECODE(A.WINDOW_ACT_ID, '', A.MENU_ACT_ID, A.WINDOW_ACT_ID) = B.WINDOW_ACT_ID(+) START WITH A.PAR_ID ='0' CONNECT BY PRIOR A.MENU_ACT_ID = A.PAR_ID ORDER SIBLINGS BY A.DISPLAY_ORDER ASC

SELECT A.* ,B.FILE_POS ,B.USER_FILE_NM ,B.PHSC_FILE_NM --,FN_DATE_FORMAT(B.REG_DTTM) AS REG_DTTM ,(SELECT FN_DATE_FORMAT(MAX(REG_DTTM)) FROM C_MANUAL_HIST WHERE LANG_CD = #{SEL_LANG_CD} AND WINDOW_ACT_ID = DECODE(A.WINDOW_ACT_ID, '', A.MENU_ACT_ID, A.WINDOW_ACT_ID) AND FILE_TYPE = 'PDF') AS REG_DTTM ,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM C_MANUAL_HIST WHERE LANG_CD = #{SEL_LANG_CD} AND WINDOW_ACT_ID = DECODE(A.WINDOW_ACT_ID, '', A.MENU_ACT_ID, A.WINDOW_ACT_ID) AND FILE_TYPE = 'WORD') AS WORD_CNT ,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM C_MANUAL_HIST WHERE LANG_CD = #{SEL_LANG_CD} AND WINDOW_ACT_ID = DECODE(A.WINDOW_ACT_ID, '', A.MENU_ACT_ID, A.WINDOW_ACT_ID) AND FILE_TYPE = 'PDF') AS PDF_CNT ,B.REG_ID FROM (SELECT X.PAR_ID ,X.PAR_DISPLAY_NM ,X.MENU_ACT_ID ,DECODE(Y.WINDOW_ACT_ID,'','▶ ' || X.WINDOW_DISPLAY_NM, ' ▷ ' || X.WINDOW_DISPLAY_NM) AS WINDOW_DISPLAY_NM ,Y.WINDOW_ACT_ID ,Y.MANUAL_YN ,X.DISPLAY_ORDER FROM ( SELECT DECODE(T.PAR_MENU_ACT_ID, 'AML_80', 'RBA', DECODE(T.MENU_ACT_ID, 'AML_80', '0', T.PAR_MENU_ACT_ID)) AS PAR_ID ,DECODE(U.DISPLAY_NM, 'RBA', '', U.DISPLAY_NM) AS PAR_DISPLAY_NM ,DECODE(T.MENU_ACT_ID, 'AML_80', 'RBA', T.MENU_ACT_ID) AS MENU_ACT_ID ,U.DISPLAY_NM AS WINDOW_DISPLAY_NM ,DECODE(T.MENU_ACT_ID, 'AML_80', 0, T.DISPLAY_ORDER) AS DISPLAY_ORDER FROM C_PKG_MENU_MAP T ,C_MENU_DISPLAY U ,(SELECT PAR_MENU_ACT_ID, MENU_ACT_ID FROM C_GROUP_ROLE_MENU_ACT_AUTH WHERE ACCESS_YN ='Y' GROUP BY PAR_MENU_ACT_ID ,MENU_ACT_ID) V WHERE T.PKG_ID = #{PKG_ID} AND T.MENU_ACT_ID = U.MENU_ACT_ID AND T.MENU_ACT_ID = V.MENU_ACT_ID AND U.LANG_CD = #{SEL_LANG_CD} --일시적용 AND (T.MENU_ACT_ID LIKE #{SCOPE_COND} OR T.MENU_ACT_ID = 'AML_80') -- ) X ,(SELECT T.MENU_ACT_ID ,T.WINDOW_ACT_ID ,U.DISPLAY_NM ,T.MANUAL_YN FROM C_MENU_WINDOW_MAP T ,C_WINDOW_DISPLAY U WHERE T.WINDOW_ACT_ID = U.WINDOW_ACT_ID AND T.WINDOW_DEFAULT_YN = 'Y' AND U.LANG_CD = #{SEL_LANG_CD} ) Y WHERE X.MENU_ACT_ID = Y.MENU_ACT_ID(+) ) A ,C_MANUAL B WHERE B.LANG_CD(+) = #{SEL_LANG_CD} AND DECODE(A.WINDOW_ACT_ID, '', A.MENU_ACT_ID, A.WINDOW_ACT_ID) = B.WINDOW_ACT_ID(+) START WITH A.PAR_ID ='0' CONNECT BY PRIOR A.MENU_ACT_ID = A.PAR_ID ORDER SIBLINGS BY A.DISPLAY_ORDER ASC

SELECT WINDOW_ACT_ID ,SEQ ,FILE_POS ,USER_FILE_NM ,PHSC_FILE_NM ,FILE_SIZE ,FILE_TYPE ,GET_USER_NAME(REG_ID) AS REG_ID ,FN_DATE_FORMAT(REG_DTTM) AS REG_DTTM FROM C_MANUAL_HIST WHERE WINDOW_ACT_ID = #{WINDOW_ACT_ID} AND LANG_CD = #{SEL_LANG_CD} ORDER BY REG_DTTM DESC
SELECT FILE_POS ,PHSC_FILE_NM ,FN_DATE_FORMAT(REG_DTTM) AS REG_DTTM FROM C_MANUAL WHERE WINDOW_ACT_ID = #{WINDOW_ACT_ID}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO C_MANUAL ( SELECT WINDOW_ACT_ID ,LANG_CD ,FILE_TYPE ,FILE_POS ,USER_FILE_NM ,PHSC_FILE_NM ,FILE_SIZE ,REG_ID ,REG_DTTM FROM (SELECT C_MANUAL_HIST.* ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY REG_DTTM DESC) AS RN FROM C_MANUAL_HIST WHERE WINDOW_ACT_ID = #{WINDOW_ACT_ID} AND LANG_CD = #{LANG_CD} AND FILE_TYPE = 'WORD') WHERE RN = 1 )
mapper.select:
SELECT A.USER_ID ,A.DEP_ID ,( SELECT DEP_TITLE FROM C_DEP_INFO WHERE DEP_ID = A.DEP_ID ) AS DEP_NM ,A.POSITION_CODE ,(SELECT DISPLAY_NM FROM C_CD_NM WHERE CD_ID = A.POSITION_CODE AND LANG_CD = 'ko-KR' ) AS POSITION_NM ,A.USER_NM ,A.LOGIN_ID ,'' AS USER_PWD ,A.USER_IP ,A.SOC_NO ,A.EMAIL ,A.CELL_PHONE ,A.ACTIVE_YN ,A.LAST_USE_DATE ,A.LAST_USE_IP ,A.PWD_FAIL_COUNT ,A.CRE_ID ,( SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE USER_ID = A.CRE_ID ) AS CRE_NM ,A.CRE_DT ,A.UPD_ID ,( SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE USER_ID = A.UPD_ID ) AS UPD_NM ,A.UPD_DT ,A.DEL_YN ,A.DEL_ID ,( SELECT USER_NM FROM C_USER WHERE USER_ID = A.DEL_ID ) AS DEL_NM ,A.DEL_DT ,A.OFF_DUTY_YN ,B.RNAME AS ROLE_NAME ,'초기화' AS INIT_SECURY FROM C_USER A LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT USER_ID ,LISTAGG(GET_ROLE_NAME(ROLE_ID),',') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY USER_ID) AS RNAME FROM C_USER_GROUP_ROLE GROUP BY USER_ID) B ON A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID WHERE 1=1
AND A.DEP_ID = #{DEP_ID}
AND A.USER_NM LIKE '%' || #{USER_NM} || '%'
ORDER BY A.USER_NM

SELECT DECODE(SIGN(A.PARENT), 1, 'N', 0, DECODE(A.TOTAL, 0, 'Y', 'C')) AS DIRECTION FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) AS TOTAL ,NVL(SUM(DECODE(MENU_ACT_ID, #{MENU_ACT_ID}, 1, 0)), 0) AS PARENT FROM C_MENU_WINDOW_MAP WHERE WINDOW_ACT_ID = #{WINDOW_ACT_ID}) A

SELECT B.MENU_ACT_ID ,A.DISPLAY_NM ,B.MENU_FORM_URL ,B.ACTIVE_MENU_IMAGE ,B.INACTIVE_MENU_IMAGE ,B.POPUP_YN ,C.DISPLAY_ORDER ,B.SCREEN_ID FROM C_MENU_DISPLAY A LEFT JOIN C_MENU_ACT B ON A.MENU_ACT_ID = B.MENU_ACT_ID LEFT JOIN C_PKG_MENU_MAP C ON B.MENU_ACT_ID = C.MENU_ACT_ID LEFT JOIN C_GROUP_ROLE_MENU_ACT_AUTH D ON C.PKG_ID = D.PKG_ID AND C.PAR_MENU_ACT_ID = D.PAR_MENU_ACT_ID AND C.MENU_ACT_ID = D.MENU_ACT_ID WHERE A.LANG_CD = #{LANG_CD} AND C.MENU_ACT_ID <> 'AML' AND B.MENU_DISPLAY_YN = 'Y' AND C.PKG_ID = #{PKG_ID} AND C.PAR_MENU_ACT_ID = #{PAR_MENU_ACT_ID} AND D.GROUP_ID = #{GROUP_ID} AND D.ROLE_ID = #{ROLE_ID} AND D.ACCESS_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY C.DISPLAY_ORDER ASC

SELECT A.MENU_ACT_ID ,A.WINDOW_ACT_ID ,C.DISPLAY_NM ,A.WINDOW_DEFAULT_YN ,B.WINDOW_DISPLAY_YN ,D.USE_YN ,D.C ,D.R ,D.U ,D.D FROM C_WINDOW_DISPLAY C INNER JOIN C_WINDOW_ACT B ON C.WINDOW_ACT_ID = B.WINDOW_ACT_ID AND C.LANG_CD = #{LANG_CD} INNER JOIN C_MENU_WINDOW_MAP A ON A.WINDOW_ACT_ID = B.WINDOW_ACT_ID LEFT JOIN C_AUTH_WINDOW_MAP D ON A.WINDOW_ACT_ID = D.WINDOW_ACT_ID AND D.GROUP_ID = #{GROUP_ID} AND D.ROLE_ID = #{ROLE_ID} WHERE A.MENU_ACT_ID = #{MENU_ACT_ID} ORDER BY A.WINDOW_ACT_ID ASC
